title: Mining Speed Tooltips
description: Adds information about harvest speed to all tools.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25a7623b35b91faebaf9c0f58e1b77b0e9451b04_0.webp)

Mining Speed Tooltips is a simple mod that adds an extra line of info text to all digging tools, such as pickaxes, axes, and shovels, showing the user the actual digging speed of the tool. Since this is normally a hidden value in vanilla Minecraft, it is commonly confused with Attack Speed, and this mod clears up that confusion.

If you have Quark installed, Mining Speed Tooltips will modify the enhanced tooltips from Quark, adding an extra number for digging speed. This also works with Quark's comparison system, so if you're holding a tool in your main hand, and hover over another tool, it will display an animated green up arrow if that tool is faster, for example.

![quark demo](https://i.imgur.com/iFx0xrS.png)

If you don't have Quark (or if you're holding shift) it will simply display an extra line of text after Attack Speed:

![demo](https://i.imgur.com/4b7D8VP.png)
